title: Hello World!
snippet: I have always wanted a personal blog site of my own. But too lazy to learn HTML & CSS. So, here I am with the saviour Jekyll.I still don’t know what am I going to write here. But Python & CPP will be therefor sure.print("Hello World!")#include <iostream>auto constexpr newline = "\n"; int main(){	std::cout << "Hello World!" << newline;}
